description: User clicks on the flight option 'Fly Fiumicino International Airport to Palermo' to view more details.
interaction_target: Fly Fiumicino International Airport to Palermo
page_title: Rome to Palermo - 8 ways to travel via train, plane, bus, ferry, and car
frame_description: The main travel options list is visible on the left, with a map of Italy on the right.

description: The sidebar content changes to show specific flight information and the map updates its view.
frame_description: The sidebar now shows flight durations and prices, and the map shows a flight path from Rome to Palermo.

description: User clicks the 'Back' button in the sidebar to return to the main list of travel options.
frame_description: The user is viewing flight details in the sidebar.

description: The sidebar displays a loading message while refreshing the travel options.
frame_description: A 'Loading results for 12 February' message is displayed in the sidebar.

description: The main list of travel options is re-rendered in the sidebar.
frame_description: The list of 8 ways to travel from Rome to Palermo is visible again.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Train' travel option.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Train, bus' travel option.

description: User hovers over a hotel advertisement in the right-hand sidebar.
